enemies to each other. Budha (Merucry) +Moon are planets of
pleasure or sensualistic planets. Mars +Mercury have ketu in the
9 to them, with this, the native will not enjoy the person who
is legally wedded or the person she had kept.
In this chart, Mars is one husband.Saturn +Venus
combination with Ravi is debilitated. Saturn is another husband.
so, she has a combination of two husbands.

Since Chandra and ketu are coming in between kuja & Budha
she has to face accusations and suffer. The cobination of sani +
sukra + Ravi make her to enjoy luxurious life for sometime. In
transit when ketu transits over virgo sign (kanya rasi) and since
the combination ofMars + Mercury + Moon + Ketu in the
South direction she will have wavering of mind, controversies
and disrepute. With this she has to leave the place. At the same
